EffectDirectory.InvalidCompendiumId: Side Effects | Effect Compendium '{compendium}' is an invalid compendium ID. Please correct the Effect Compendium setting.
EffectDirectory.InvalidCompendium: Side Effects | Effect Compendium '{compendium}' is invalid or does not exist. Please correct the compendium or Effect Compendium setting.

CreateCompendium.Prompt: Effect Compendium '{compendiumId}' does not exist. Effect Interface will not load. Do you want to automatically create a new compendium named '{compendiumName}' and reload?
CreateCompendium.Title: Side Effects | Create Effect Compendium

EffectCompendium.Name: Effect Compendium ID
EffectCompendium.Hint: The Compendium ID of the compendium that is linked to the Effect Interface. To copy a Compendium ID, open the compendium and click the book in the top right. Paste the ID here. Default is 'world.side-effects'.

EffectInterfacePlacement.Name: Effect Interface Placement
EffectInterfacePlacement.Hint: Sidebar tab which the Effect Interface is placed after.

EffectInterfaceEnabled.Name: Enable Effect Interface
EffectInterfaceEnabled.Hint: Enables the Effect Interface, a document directory in the sidebar which is linked to a compendium. Allows custom status effects and managment of effects.
